reviewer_notes: Recent foundation model (2025). Lacks independent third-party comprehensive benchmarks for representation learning. Defer benchmark extraction to prevent bias from self-reported metrics; rely on primary method authority.
Foundation model without an established independent third-party benchmark. Defer benchmark requirement.

Resolved by benchmark_gap_verified_benchmark_human_review.tsv: DOI corrected to 10.1038/s41467-020-20430-7. Formal fact is bounded to factor interpretability and clinical/survival-associated molecular features; do not claim universal MOFA2 superiority.
Highly recent OT framework (2025). Third-party independent benchmarking is scarce. Defer benchmark requirement and rely on primary method self-evaluation.
Waddington-OT is a highly specific mathematical framework rather than a general-purpose trajectory tool. Keep caveat: strictly requires highly dense time-series sampling to function properly.

Original linear model framework for Perturb-seq. Lacks modern generalized benchmarks against deep learning methods. Keep caveat: historically significant but may lack expressivity for complex modern multimodal datasets.

Resolved by benchmark_gap_verified_benchmark_human_review.tsv using RNA velocity unraveled, DOI 10.1371/journal.pcbi.1010492. Formal fact is caveat/negative-control evidence; do not use as positive ranking evidence.

Foundation model doing spatial omics, but spatial deconvolution is a highly specific downstream task better served by dedicated models (e.g., cell2location). Mark as supporting/downstream only to prevent it from usurping primary deconvolution recommendations.
